spec_match.rationale: Perfect representation of LNA spec rules.

interactive.rationale: Toggles origins and fetch targets with buttons, displaying evaluating decision-tree rows instantly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Extremely well aligned with the threat models.

design_system.rationale: Complies with paper backgrounds and stone containers.

summary: A neat interactive evaluator tracing public origins requesting private resources step-by-step.
